## Summary

## Entry Type

- [ ] New driver entry
- [ ] Update existing entry
- [ ] Move stale/legacy entry
- [ ] Documentation or tooling

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Entry is a GitHub repository root URL
- [ ] Entry is driver/hardware-interface/controller related
- [ ] README and `data/index.json` were both updated
- [ ] No compatibility, safety, or hardware-test claim is made without upstream evidence
